notes: v1.14.85 - Redesign Step 2 cont. (re-home Reference -> Optics): the whole pg-fiber surface (Fiber Types/Form Factors/MPO-HPC/DOM-DDM/Optic/Cables/Triage subtabs + 8 fiber-sub panels, the Optic-Score tool, all toggleCard/openSopDetail launchers) is re-homed into Reference->Optics by re-parenting all of pg-fiber's children into #rf-optics at boot (redesign_homeOptics), then initSubtab() defaults the inner Fiber Types subtab. Flag-gated: with the flag off (field default) pg-fiber stays put and the KNOW nav tab, voice router, and search all work unchanged; the 13 fiber search-index hits gain a ref:'rf-optics' hint that only fires in redesign mode (showRefTab). Reference default tab flipped Know -> Optics (first tab). The fiber strip's Hardware/CLI cross-links still point to the old pages until those re-home. Nothing else moved.
